mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT au.id, au.username, au.nickname, CAST(au.avatar AS CHAR) AS avatar, au.email, au.phone, au.user_id AS userId, au.role_id AS roleId, CAST(au.status AS UNSIGNED) AS status, au.last_login_ip AS lastLoginIp, au.last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, au.created_at AS createdAt, ar.name AS roleName FROM admin_user au LEFT JOIN admin_role ar ON au.role_id = ar.id
au.deleted = 0
AND (au.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR au.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY au.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
